summary: Iteration 34: Unified Login/Register Pages + FAQ Sections + Reset Onboarding Tests - ALL MAJOR TESTS PASSED. Tested unified login page with 4 role selector icons (Parents, Students, Teachers, Brands), unified register page with 3 role icons, FAQ sections for all user types, and reset onboarding (Tutorial) buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: All unified login/register pages working correctly with role selector icons
FAQ sections using FAQSection component with proper data-testid attributes
Reset onboarding (Tutorial) button correctly clears localStorage and re-shows wizard
Old routes correctly redirect with query params (/student-login → /login?type=student)
Teacher Portal has FAQ tab but NO Tutorial/reset onboarding button (by design per code review)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified login/register pages, FAQ sections, and reset onboarding buttons all working. The Teacher Portal intentionally does not have a Tutorial button (only FAQ tab). All route redirects working correctly.

unified_login_page: Login page loads at /login with 4 role selector icons - PASSED
Default is Parent role with email/password form - PASSED
Clicking 'Students' icon switches to Student Code + PIN form fields - PASSED
Clicking 'Teachers' icon switches to email + password form with teacher@school.edu placeholder - PASSED
Clicking 'Brands' icon switches to email + password form with brand@company.com placeholder - PASSED
Clicking 'Parents' icon switches back to parent email + password form - PASSED
Parent (admin) login works: allen@songsforcenturies.com / LexiAdmin2026! redirects to /admin - PASSED
Student login works via unified page: STU-DR40V7 / 914027 redirects to /academy - PASSED
unified_register_page: Register page loads at /register with 3 role icons (Parents, Teachers, Brands) - PASSED
No Students role on register page (correct - students don't self-register) - PASSED
Referral code field shows only for Parent role - PASSED
Teacher role shows 'Ms. Johnson' name placeholder - PASSED
Brand role shows 'Company Name' placeholder - PASSED
Brand role shows 'Brand Partner Registration' title - PASSED
old_route_redirects: /student-login redirects to /login?type=student with student tab pre-selected - PASSED
/teacher-login redirects to /login?type=teacher with teacher tab pre-selected - PASSED
/teacher-register redirects to /register?role=teacher with teacher tab pre-selected - PASSED
